description: Patient Luna presents to the emergency department with severe right lower quadrant abdominal pain (8/10 severity) starting 18 hours ago, accompanied by fever, nausea, and loss of appetite. Physical examination reveals tenderness at McBurney's point with rebound tenderness. As the attending emergency physician, Dr. Cameron Cordara, document this acute presentation in GNU Health. Record the urgency level, vital signs (temperature and heart rate), at least two relevant laboratory test orders, the appropriate ICD-10 diagnosis code, and a determination on surgical consultation. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
